rows.finalText: The cards answer "How do I commit to the path that feels deeply aligned" through Purpose / Calling with a commitment emphasis. Stars House now holds Querent (29), which puts your own stance toward the path, including how much of it is truly chosen and how much is inherited habit at the center of the reading.
